§6Reformate§f

§aA high-energy intermediate bridging vacuum refining and advanced fuel production — the key to BTX, jet fuel, and high-octane diesel!§f

Reformate is a high-grade, viscous liquid (§e2.4 MTU§f / §e6.0 MHE§f per bucket) produced by the §bVacuum Refinery§f or §bCatalytic Reformer§f. It is a critical intermediate for producing §bBTX§f, §bJet Fuel§f, and §bHigh-Octane Diesel§f.

§6Production§f:
§b• Vacuum Refinery§f (Crude Oil @ 2 PU): §e250mB§f per §e1,000mB§f crude oil.
§b• Vacuum Refinery§f (Desulfurized Crude Oil @ 2 PU): §e250mB§f per §e1,000mB§f.
§b• Catalytic Reformer§f (Naphtha): §e1,000mB§f → §e500mB§f Reformate + byproducts.
§b• Catalytic Reformer§f (Cracked Naphtha): §e1,000mB§f → §e500mB§f Reformate + §e100mB§f Aromatic HC + §e50mB§f LH.
§b• Catalytic Reformer§f (Coker Naphtha): §e1,000mB§f → §e500mB§f Reformate + §e100mB§f Reformate Gas + §e50mB§f LH.
§b• Coker Unit§f: §e3,500mB§f Vacuum Heavy Oil → §e1×§f Petroleum Coke + §e350mB§f Reformate.

§6Uses§f:
§b• Fractioning Tower§f: §e100mB§f Reformate → §e60mB§f BTX + §e40mB§f Aromatic Hydrocarbons.
§b• Industrial Mixer§f:
  §b– §e100mB§f Reformate + §e900mB§f Kerosene → §e1,000mB§f Jet Fuel.
  §b– §e100mB§f Reformate + §e900mB§f Diesel → §e1,000mB§f High-Octane Diesel.
  §b– §e100mB§f Reformate + §e900mB§f Cracked Diesel → §e1,000mB§f High-Octane Cracked Diesel.
§b• Coker Unit§f: §e130mB§f Reformate → §e1×§f Petroleum Coke + §e13mB§f Coker Gas.
§b• Catalytic Cracking Tower§f: §e100mB§f → §e40mB§f Unsaturated HC + §e60mB§f Reformate Gas.

§eTip§f: Reformate is renewable through the Vacuum Refinery. Don't crack or coke it — fractioning it into §bBTX§f gives you access to advanced chemical production chains!
